stories.title: Finish Entry -> Entry Reflection screen
stories.description: After pressing Finish entry, navigate to an Entry Reflection screen that shows AI-generated reflection content (reflection + key insight) and an entry-specific Suggestions entry point. Must not show any long-term memory upsell.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing Finish entry still saves the journal entry as completed (no regressions)
After saving, user is navigated to an Entry Reflection screen for the finished entry
Entry Reflection shows: reflection body text and a Key Insight section (AI-generated)
Entry Reflection includes a Suggestions row/CTA that opens the Suggestions list
Entry Reflection includes a Continue button to proceed in the flow
No UI for 'Add to long-term memory' exists anywhere in this flow

stories.title: Suggestions list -> add HABIT below Ingredients
stories.description: Implement a Suggestions list UI (HABIT cards) and allow adding suggestions to Happiness Recipe as a new item type 'habit' rendered below Ingredients.
acceptanceCriteria: Entry Reflection -> Suggestions opens a Suggestions list screen
Suggestions list renders HABIT suggestion cards with an 'Add to list' button
Pressing 'Add to list' creates a Happiness Recipe item of type 'habit'
Happiness Recipe screen renders a Habits section below Ingredients
Habit items persist across restarts and are included in existing completed/active behavior
Duplicate habit additions are prevented (case-insensitive match)

stories.title: Streak haiku celebration after reflection
stories.description: After the Entry Reflection, show a streak celebration screen/modal that displays 'X DAY STREAK' and an AI-generated haiku. Provide Continue and Close affordances.
acceptanceCriteria: After Entry Reflection Continue, a streak celebration view is shown
Celebration view displays current streak count (e.g., '1 DAY STREAK')
Celebration view displays an AI-generated haiku (3 lines) related to the entry
Celebration view supports Continue to exit back to the app (Today or Entries)
Celebration view supports Close (X) to skip

stories.title: AI Service for Weekly Insights
stories.description: Implement AI service capabilities to analyze a week's worth of journal entries and generate structured insights: Emotional Landscape, Key Themes, and Cast of Characters.
acceptanceCriteria: New function `generateWeeklyInsights(entries)` in `services/ai.ts`
Returns valid JSON with emotional landscape (emotions + values), key themes (list), and cast of characters (list)
Handles empty or insufficient data gracefully
Includes unit tests with mocked AI responses

stories.title: Insights Page UI Implementation
stories.description: Build the Insights page matching `example-design/insights.html` strictly. Includes Weekly Report card, Writing Stats card (with chart), and Week So Far card (Emotional Landscape chart, Themes, Characters).
acceptanceCriteria: Screen `app/(tabs)/insights.tsx` created and added to navigation
Matches design: Weekly Report card with 'Unlocks Saturday' logic
Matches design: Writing Stats with Words/Entries count and Daily Words bar chart
Matches design: Week So Far with Emotional Landscape bar chart (emojis), Key Themes chips, and Cast of Characters
Uses `NativeWind` for styling, strictly adhering to design spacing/colors
Connects to real data (via hook) from AI service and Journal Storage

stories.title: Emoji Settings & Customization
stories.description: Allow users to customize the emoji style used in the Emotional Landscape chart via a settings interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings screen (or section) allows selecting Emoji Style (e.g., Default, Minimal, etc.)
Selection persists in storage
Insights page reflects the selected emoji style in the Emotional Landscape chart
Unit/Integration tests for setting persistence and UI update
